synopsis: The book surveys modern cosmology through questions about the universe’s origin, structure, boundaries, and eventual fate. It explains ideas including the big bang, black holes, quantum mechanics, relativity, the arrow of time, and the search for a unified theory capable of describing the fundamental forces of nature.

sources.title: A Brief History of Time | Penguin Random House Retail

synopsis: Ignatius Reilly, an unemployed medievalist who rejects modern life, is pushed into a series of jobs across New Orleans after his mother’s financial troubles force him from home. His schemes at a pants factory and behind a hot-dog cart entangle an ensemble of workers, police officers, merchants, and family acquaintances in escalating comic disorder.

sources.title: A Confederacy of Dunces | Grove Atlantic

synopsis: The book traces recurring political disagreements to two contrasting assumptions about human nature: a constrained vision that treats human limits and self-interest as enduring, and an unconstrained vision that sees people as improvable. It compares how these premises shape views of knowledge, reason, equality, justice, power, social processes, and the role of institutions.

sources.title: A Conflict Of Visions - Thomas Sowell - Google Books
A Conflict of Visions by Thomas Sowell | Hachette Book Group

synopsis: War veteran Henry Bone returns from the War at the End of Time to resume a quiet life distilling whisky on the rural planet Ferro. When other cybernetically enhanced soldiers arrive after traveling across a billion years, their hostile purpose draws Bone and his community toward a confrontation shaped by the veterans’ unusual capabilities.

sources.title: A Dry Quiet War | Infinivox SF
A Dry, Quiet War by Tony Daniel | Open Library

synopsis: In a galaxy divided into zones that limit intelligence and technology, an experiment releases a destructive superintelligence while two human children become stranded among a species whose individuals form group minds. A rescue mission crosses a vast communications network and a widening interstellar war, seeking the children and a possible defense before the threat spreads.

sources.title: A Fire Upon The Deep - Macmillan Academic

synopsis: In 1922, a Bolshevik tribunal sentences Count Alexander Rostov to lifelong house arrest inside Moscow’s Metropol Hotel, moving him from a luxury suite to an attic room. Over the following decades, as Soviet history unfolds beyond the hotel, his relationships with its staff and guests reshape his sense of purpose, community, responsibility, and freedom.

sources.title: A Gentleman in Moscow by Amor Towles | PenguinRandomHouse.com
A gentleman in Moscow | British Council Sri Lanka library catalog

synopsis: The book presents Stoicism as a practical philosophy for reducing dissatisfaction and cultivating tranquility in modern life. It explains techniques such as negative visualization, focusing effort on what can be controlled, accepting the past, practicing self-denial, and reflecting on one’s conduct, then applies them to relationships, grief, anger, aging, status, and material desire.

sources.title: A Guide to the Good Life: The Ancient Art of Stoic Joy | Oxford Academic

synopsis: The book follows the mathematical constant pi across civilizations, showing how attempts to understand and calculate it develop alongside advances in mathematics and science. It places those discoveries in their historical settings, contrasting periods of intellectual progress with times when political power, militarism, or religious dogma suppress inquiry.

This five-volume set collects forty-one essays selected through the LessWrong community’s review of writing published in 2018. Organized around epistemology, agency, coordination, curiosity, and artificial-intelligence alignment, the essays examine general methods for forming accurate beliefs and making effective decisions across topics including probability, introspection, markets, aesthetics, altruism, and machine learning.

sources.title: Books: A Map that Reflects the Territory | LessWrong
